meaning: n.摘要,概要,抽象;adj.抽象的,深奥的,理论的;vt.摘要,提炼,抽象化
examples: Abstract art is an acquired taste.
It's not a question of some abstract concept of justice.
A modern abstract painting takes over one complete wall.
Each specialises in contemporary Canadian art, ranging from photoconceptualism to sculpture, abstract painting to First Nations artworks.
The Abstract Expressionist painter Clyfford Still numbered his canvases because no words could do them justice.
